aries.general: Today is a day for bold actions; trust your instincts.
aries.love: Deep emotional connections are in the air; be open.
aries.career: Opportunities for leadership may arise; be ready.

taurus.general: Stability surrounds you; focus on building solid foundations.
taurus.love: Communication is key in relationships today.
taurus.career: Hard work will pay off; recognition is near.

gemini.general: Your social life takes center stage; enjoy networking.
gemini.career: Flexibility is your ally; adapt to changes promptly.

cancer.general: Intuition guides you; trust your inner voice.
cancer.love: A nurturing atmosphere fosters lasting bonds.
cancer.career: Creativity brings success; think outside the box.

leo.general: Your enthusiasm is contagious; inspire others.
leo.love: Passion is heightened; embrace the moment.

virgo.general: Attention to detail brings rewards; be meticulous.

libra.general: Seek balance in all areas of life; harmony is key.
libra.career: Networking opens doors; don’t hesitate to connect.

scorpio.general: Embrace transformation; change brings new opportunities.
scorpio.love: Intensity in feelings can lead to breakthroughs.
scorpio.career: Take calculated risks for greater rewards.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls; don’t fear stepping outside your comfort zone.
sagittarius.career: Opportunities for travel or learning may arise.

capricorn.general: Hard work leads to success; stay committed.
capricorn.love: A solid foundation deepens romantic ties.

aquarius.love: Friendship can lead to romance; explore bonds.

pisces.general: Emotional sensitivity is heightened; trust your feelings.
pisces.love: Deep connections are formed; share your heart.
pisces.career: Artistic talents may be recognized; showcase your skills.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
professional.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.
motivation.author: Wayne Gretzky

motivation.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
motivation.author: Albert Schweitzer

captions.text: Every day is a new beginning.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
captions.author: Christian D. Larson

captions.text: Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Create the life you can’t wait to wake up to.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: The great growling engine of change – technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and it froze!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: What did one ocean say to the other ocean? Nothing, they just waved.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Everything is possible for one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: Where there is faith there is life.
faith.author: Mahandas Gandhi

faith.text: Faith consists in believing when it is beyond the power of reason to believe.
faith.author: Voltaire

faith.text: Prayers go up, blessings come down.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, the mind should be open.
wisdom.author: Philosophical Unknown

wisdom.text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the daughter of experience.
wisdom.author: Leonardo da Vinci
